title: Very Sticky Pistons
description: Changes the texture of sticky pistons to make them more recognisable from the side, while looking cleaner and more consistent than a "sticky sides" texture.
body:
Changes the texture of sticky pistons to make them more recognisable from the side, while looking cleaner and more consistent than a "sticky sides" texture.
Also includes alternate honey textures.

It now looks like the slime was applied evenly with a brush, rather than stuck to the face of the piston.

Add-on versions are currently available for [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones), [Quadral](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quadral), [BlockPixel](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockpixel), and [MS Painted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ms-painted).

I won't be making add-ons for any photorealistic or highly detailed packs because I don't feel confident working outside of pixel art. 
I'd rather not make add-ons for Faithful or other 32x packs.

This can be used with my other resource pack, [Fish-Free Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fish-free-pistons).
